 Gemini CLI v0.38.1

 Signed in with Google /auth
 Plan: Gemini Code Assist for individuals /upgrade

╭──────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ We're making changes to Gemini CLI that may      │
│ impact your workflow.                            │
│ What's Changing: We are adding more robust       │
│ detection of policy-violating use cases and      │
│ restricting models for free tier users.          │
│ How it affects you: If you need use of Gemini    │
│ pro models you will need to upgrade to a         │
│ supported paid plan.                             │
│ Read more: https://goo.gle/geminicli-updates     │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

Tips for getting started:
1. Create GEMINI.md files to customize your
interactions
2. /help for more information
3. Ask coding questions, edit code or run commands
4. Be specific for the best results

ℹ Gemini CLI update available! 0.38.1 → 0.38.2
  Installed via Homebrew. Please update with "brew
  upgrade gemini-cli".

 > 동작 테스트

  building the code and running the existing tests.

ℹ Request cancelled.
▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀
 > python 10줄짜리 샘플 스크립트 출력해줘           
▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄
✦ 간단한 HTTP 요청을 보내고 결과를 출력하는 10줄
  내외의 파이썬 샘플 스크립트입니다.

    1 import requests
    2
    3 def fetch_data(url):
    4     try:
    5         response = requests.get(url)
    6         response.raise_for_status()
    7         return response.json()
    8     except Exception as e:
    9         return f"Error: {e}"
   10
   11 data =
      fetch_data("https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.c
      om/todos/1")
   12 print(data)

────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 Shift+Tab to accept edits
